data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Perak  (Kampar, Hilir Perak, Batang Padang and Muallim);  Kelantan  (Bachok and Pasir Puteh);  Terengganu ;  Pahang  (Cameron Highlands, Lipis, Raub, Bentong, Temerloh, Maran and Bera);  Selangor  (Hulu Selangor, Gombak and Hulu Langat);  FT Kuala Lumpur ;  Negeri Sembilan  (Jelebu); and  Sabah:  Interior (Nabawan and Tambunan), West Coast (Papar, Putatan, Penampang, Kota Kinabalu, Tuaran and Kota Belud) and Sandakan (Tongod, Telupid, Beluran and Sandakan) until 9:00PM; Tuesday, 23 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Perak  (Kampar, Hilir Perak, Batang Padang dan Muallim);  Kelantan  (Bachok dan Pasir Puteh);  Terengganu ;  Pahang  (Tanah Tinggi Cameron, Lipis, Raub, Bentong, Temerloh, Maran dan Bera);  Selangor  (Hulu Selangor, Gombak dan Hulu Langat);  WP Kuala Lumpur ;  Negeri Sembilan  (Jelebu); dan  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Nabawan dan Tambunan), Pantai Barat (Papar, Putatan, Penampang, Kota Kinabalu, Tuaran dan Kota Belud) dan Sandakan (Tongod, Telupid, Beluran dan Sandakan) sehingga 9:00 malam; Selasa, 23 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Terengganu and Western Sabah and Labuan, Eastern Sabah until 9:00PM; Tuesday, 23 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Terengganu dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan, Sabah Timur sehingga 9:00 malam; Selasa, 23 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of eastern part of Phuket, Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, northern part of Condore, northern part of Reef North, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan and Sulu until 9:00PM; Tuesday, 23 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan timur Phuket, Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, utara Condore, utara Reef North, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 9:00 malam; Selasa, 23 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Category:  Typhoon Advisory (MEKKHALA)                  Time of Observation:  17:00, 23 June 2026                  Location:  Latitude 19.3 North and Longitude 124.6 East                  Movement:  Northwest 10 km/h.                  Maximum wind speed:  185 km/h                  Distance from nearest international city:  approximately 460 km Northeast of Luzon, Philippines.                  Distance from nearest Malaysian city:  Approximately 1616 km Northeast of Sandakan, Sabah.                  Threat to Malaysia:  No significant impact.
data.text_bm: Kategori:  Nasihat Taufan (MEKKHALA)                  Masa Pencerapan:  17:00, 23 Jun 2026                  Kedudukan:  Latitud 19.3 Utara dan Longitud 124.6 Timur                  Pergerakan:  Ke arah Barat Laut dengan kelajuan 10 km/j.                  Kelajuan angin maksimum:  185 km/j                  Jarak dari bandar antarabangsa terdekat:  kira-kira 460 km Timur Laut Luzon, Philippines.                  Jarak dari bandar terdekat:  Kira-kira 1616 km Timur Laut Kudat, Sabah.                  Kesan terhadap Malaysia:  Tiada kesan signifikan.
